actual_current_surface_status: bounded-support / two-source taste-radial C_sx/C_xx row contract; production rows absent
conditional_surface_status: conditional-support if production rows are run with this schema and a separate canonical O_H/source-overlap or physical-response bridge closes

contract_smoke_analysis.measurement_object: same-ensemble C_ss/C_sx/C_xx(q) rows for the supplied taste-radial second-source certificate

finite_row_gram.strict_limit: Finite-mode rows are not pole residues.  Gram purity can only be evaluated after isolated-pole residue extraction and FV/IR/model-class gates.

operator.identity_certificate: same-surface source-vertex certificate only; canonical O_H identity absent
operator.normalization_certificate: source_norm_matched: on the cold Cl(3)/Z^3 surface Tr X^dagger X equals Tr I^dagger I over site-color degrees of freedom.  This is not scalar LSZ or canonical Higgs normalization.
operator.operator_definition: Gauge-covariant blocked-hypercube taste-radial source X=(X_1+X_2+X_3)/sqrt(3), where X_i flips the spatial parity bit inside each 2^3 Cl(3)/Z^3 block using the connecting SU(3) link.

contract_smoke_analysis.source_coordinate: same uniform additive lattice scalar source s entering m_bare + s
contract_smoke_analysis.strict_limit: This analysis emits finite-momentum cross-correlator rows.  It does not supply pole residues, Gram-purity closure, or retained y_t authorization without the source-Higgs certificate builder and postprocessor gates.

two_source_taste_radial_row_aliases.strict_limit: C_sx/C_xx aliases are second-source taste-radial rows.  They are not canonical-Higgs C_sH/C_HH rows unless a separate canonical O_H/source-overlap bridge passes.

exact_next_action: Run production C_sx/C_xx rows using this schema, then supply a canonical O_H/source-overlap bridge or genuine physical-response bypass before retained-route gates can pass.

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.two_source_action: exact-support / same-surface two-source taste-radial action source vertex realized; canonical O_H and production pole rows absent
parent_statuses.two_source_chart: exact-support / same-surface two-source taste-radial chart; canonical O_H and production rows absent

proposal_allowed_reason: The runner certifies only the C_sx/C_xx row schema contract for the taste-radial second source.  It does not provide production rows, pole residues, canonical O_H identity, kappa_s, or retained-route authorization.
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained y_t closure
does not treat C_sx/C_xx aliases as canonical-Higgs C_sH/C_HH rows
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
does not provide production C_sx/C_xx rows or pole residues
